creator: donaldcallen@gmail.com
text: I just attempted to install 10.3 on a Thinkpad, having had good results with this release on a couple of desktops. I got bitten by this same problem in the installer. I need static IP addresses so I can scp, rsync, and ssh among my various machines whose addresses I list in /etc/hosts. I realize I'm not paying for this software and you don't have infinite resources, but I can't believe I'm the only one who sets up multiple machines on a LAN this way and it's been almost two years since I originally reported this bug and it has still not been fixed.
